ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Patient's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Patient's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Patient's gender */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's physical address */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Patient's emergency contact information */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Patient's insurance provider information */,
  "primary_care_physician" INTEGER /* ID of the patient's primary care physician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_primary_care_physician FOREIGN KEY ("primary_care_physician") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., consultation, surgery) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource involved in the action (e.g., doctor, lab) */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the action was recorded */,
  "case_start" TEXT /* Start time of the case */,
  "case_end" TEXT /* End time of the case */,
  "relative_time" TEXT /* Time duration of the case relative to the start */,
  "action_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of actions taken for the case */,
  "num_actions" INTEGER /* Number of actions recorded for the case */,
  "case_length" TEXT /* Total length of the case */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the action */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the action took place */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the action */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., physician, technician) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the resource */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the resource */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the resource belongs to */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability schedule of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for the appointment */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource (doctor/nurse) for the appointment */,
  "appointment_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the appointment */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test performed (e.g., blood test, physical test) */,
  "test_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the test was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab where the test was performed */,
  "lab_technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab technician who performed the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_lab_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_technician_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surgeries" (
  "surgery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surgery */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for the surgery */,
  "surgery_type" TEXT /* Type of surgery performed */,
  "surgery_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the surgery */,
  "surgeon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the surgeon who performed the surgery */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the surgery */,
  "anesthesiologist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anesthesiologist involved in the surgery */,
  "assisting_surgeon_id" INTEGER /* ID of any assisting surgeon */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the surgery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surgery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surgeries_assisting_surgeon_id FOREIGN KEY ("assisting_surgeon_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surgeries_surgeon_id FOREIGN KEY ("surgeon_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surgeries_anesthesiologist_id FOREIGN KEY ("anesthesiologist_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surgeries_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_ups" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for the follow-up */,
  "follow_up_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the follow-up appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the follow-up appointment */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the follow-up appointment */,
  "next_appointment" TEXT /* Date and time of the next follow-up appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for the history record */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the patient */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition ended */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the condition */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Relevant family medical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies the patient has */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Medications the patient is currently taking or has taken in the past */,
  "surgical_history" TEXT /* Past surgeries the patient has undergone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_histories_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the patient record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient record being accessed */,
  "access_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., viewed, edited) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
